title: WebSocket Connection Protocol 1 Connect Request
description: Handshake request sent by the party that opens the WebSocket TCP connection.

role.title: Connection role
role.description: Identifies the initiator's role: application when a native app connects to a DA, desktopAgent when a DA connects to a native app WS server.

sessionId.title: Session ID
sessionId.description: Routes the connection to the correct DA user session.

sharedSecret.title: Shared secret
sharedSecret.description: Per-user, per-app pairing credential for initial connection. MUST be omitted on application-initiated reconnect when instanceUuid is supplied and recognized by the DA. MAY be a single-use launch token when the DA starts the application.

appId.title: appId
appId.description: Optional app identifier. If provided, the acceptor MUST verify it matches the pairing.

instanceId.title: instanceId
instanceId.description: Optional prior instance ID for reconnection.

instanceUuid.title: instanceUuid
instanceUuid.description: Optional DA-assigned instance UUID for reconnection.
